title: General complaints in Among Us

evidence.content: got banned for no reason didnt tell me why i got perma ban
all the other players are genuine rocks i have never seen this level of unheard stupidity ever, never play this game if you have common sense and want to stay sane.

Booted up the game trying to have fun with some friends
We wanted to mess around and play hide and seek
That game led to a argument with everyone blocking each other at the end

I personally don’t recommend among us because it makes you lose friends 
It’s a good game for what it is but it ruins frie
